title: BDS/TFL Input - Oncology NSCLC
protocolSynopsis: Randomized phase 3 multicenter trial in first-line metastatic NSCLC. Objective: compare investigational therapy plus SOC vs SOC alone. Primary endpoint: PFS. Secondary: OS, ORR, safety.
bdsSummary: Population: ITT N=612 (Treat=306, Control=306). Median age 62. Male 58%. ECOG 0/1: 44%/56%.
tflOrRtf:
EFFICACY TABLES: PFS HR=0.76 (95% CI 0.64-0.90), p=0.0018. Median PFS 10.9 vs 8.2 months. ORR 47.1% vs 34.3%.
SAFETY TABLES: TEAE any grade 92.5% vs 88.9%; Grade>=3 TEAE 46.2% vs 41.7%. Discontinuation due to AE 12.4% vs 9.1%.

title: BDS/TFL Input - Rheumatoid Arthritis
protocolSynopsis: Phase 2 randomized, double-blind trial in moderate-to-severe rheumatoid arthritis. Primary endpoint: change in DAS28 at week 12. Secondary: ACR20/50, safety.
bdsSummary: Population: N=238 randomized (Treat=158, Placebo=80). Mean age 54. Female 71%. Disease duration median 6.1 years.
tflOrRtf:
EFFICACY: Mean DAS28 change -2.1 vs -1.4 at week 12 (difference -0.7; p=0.004). ACR50 response 38% vs 24%.
SAFETY: Any AE 64% vs 58%; serious AE 3.8% vs 2.5%; discontinuation due to AE 4.4% vs 3.7%.
